downstream_consumers.impact: Will call normalize_ticket_json/normalize_ticket_csv_row and wrap the returned blob as RawDocument.text; no code exists there yet to break.

risk_notes: No existing code depends on agents/ingestion/normalize_ticket.py yet (new module, package currently only exports normalize_pdf and normalize_email); zero regression risk to 3.3.1/3.3.2.

CSV row cannot natively express a nested list field; comments modeled as a JSON-encoded string column in CSV input, which is a disclosed judgment call, not a silent behavior difference between JSON and CSV code paths.
No real support-ticket dataset exists in data/ yet (issue #19 scope) -- schema is an original disclosed design, flagged for possible revision once a real dataset lands.
